title: Update assistantUx placeholders for assistant-first identity
completion_summary: Updated getIdleOutputPlaceholder to assistant-first: removed sessionMode check, unified placeholders. browser/elevenlabs -> Tap mic, unsupported -> Voice unsupported, default -> Prestix is ready. Tests updated (7 tests, 12 assertions all pass).

context_files.reason: Current assistantUx structure and assistant-first placeholder requirements

acceptance_criteria: getIdleOutputPlaceholder() returns 'Tap handsfree mic and start talking.' for ALL session modes when voice available
Returns 'Voice output unsupported in this browser.' when speechOutputProvider is 'unsupported'
Returns 'Prestix is ready.' when speechOutputProvider is 'pending' (not 'Awaiting assistant reply...')
Removes sessionMode check — replacement text is mode-agnostic
assistantUx.test.ts updated to match new expected placeholders
All other existing tests still pass
